raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The state budget allocates $1 million for research on INSV/PW pathogens affecting leafy green crops in Monterey County.",
    "The leafy greens industry in Monterey County generates billions of dollars for local and state economies.",
    "The average grower lost millions of dollars in revenue due to the INSV/PW pathogens last year.",
    "Managing the INSV/PW pathogens resulted in cost increases of approximately $700 per acre for growers.",
    "The funding will support the INSVV/PW Task Force in developing integrated pest management methods.",
    "Research findings on INSV/PW will help mitigate disease spread in Monterey County and guide public policy in affected areas."
  ]
}
```
